title: David Attenborough: A Life on Our Planet
posterAlt: David Attenborough: A Life on Our Planet (2020) movie poster
tmdbOverview: The story of life on our planet by the man who has seen more of the natural world than any other. In more than 90 years, Attenborough has visited every continent on the globe, exploring the wild places of our planet and documenting the living world in all its variety and wonder. Addressing the biggest challenges facing life on our planet, the film offers a powerful message of hope for future generations.
synopsis: Released in 2020, David Attenborough: A Life on Our Planet is a documentary and drama film from United Kingdom. It's highly rated, holding a strong 8.9 on IMDb. A standout of 2020s cinema, it earns its spot on our lists. It carries a PG certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
